name: Korat civic and retail core
capture_notes: Provincial-capital demand basin combining government, hospital, railway, retail, and dense urban trips across the city core.

name: The Mall - Terminal 21 - Mittraphap urban spine
capture_notes: Modern retail and arterial-access spine where major mall, hotel, office, and city traffic overlap in a high-visibility charging corridor.

name: Route 304 south campus and medical cluster
capture_notes: Suranaree University, hospital-side activity, and Route 304 southbound movement create a broad urban-fringe destination field.

name: Save One - bus terminal - south-west service band
capture_notes: Large-format market, bus-terminal movement, hospitals, and urban roadside service demand support mixed-use charging on the south-west side.

name: Pak Chong gateway corridor
capture_notes: Mittraphap gateway movement, tourism spillover, and service-town demand make Pak Chong the province's strongest intercity node outside central Korat.
